creator: freebsd@mosedal.net
text:
Created attachment 213394
Patch that pets portlint and fixes build on CURRENT

Hi,
Attached is a patch that fixes build on FreeBSD- 13.0 after the import of LLVM 10.0.
It also tries to pet portlint so that the Makefile is correctly formatted. (Formatting was done initially with portfmt).
Since this is my first maintainer update to this port, I am not sure if I need to do anything special (or set special flags).

All the best,

Peter.
